stories.title: World Cup favorites France unravel as Spain book s...
stories.summary: Spain have sealed their place in the 2026 World Cup final, but why did France collapse so easily?

stories.title: France-Spain player ratings: Porro, Rodri earn hig...
stories.summary: Spain received strong performances up and down the lineup as they beat France to make the World Cup final.

stories.title: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
stories.summary: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

stories.title: Sources: Maxey-led 76ers trio has talked to LeBron...
stories.summary: 76ers stars Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid and Jaylen Brown have all been in communication with LeBron James amid the team's pursuit, sources told ESPN on Tuesday, with Maxey leading the charge.

stories.title: Fan fired for alleged racist message to Aces' Gray...
stories.summary: Hilton Grand Vacations said Tuesday that it has fired a man who allegedly sent a racist message to Aces guard Chelsea Gray on social media.
